name: Polymesh.PolymeshHealthCheckEnum
summary: Polymesh check error result codes. See the PolymeshCheckerFlags to see how to set the various checks.

enum_values.name: PolymeshLevelError
enum_values.summary: The vertex array contains vertices that are geometrically equivalent or the polymesh contains unused vertices

enum_values.name: PolymeshUndefined
enum_values.summary: Polymesh is null, the creation failed or unknown reasons.

enum_values.name: PolymeshOk
enum_values.summary: Valid polymesh

enum_values.name: NumOfVerticesOuterloop
enum_values.summary: Number of vertices in outer loop too small

enum_values.name: NumOfVerticesInnerloop
enum_values.summary: Number of vertices in innerloop too small

enum_values.name: VertexArrayOuterloop
enum_values.summary: Check of indices of vertices in outer loop failed

enum_values.name: VertexArrayInnerloop
enum_values.summary: Check of indices of vertices in the innerloop failed

enum_values.name: InnerloopNotInsideOuterloop
enum_values.summary: Inner loop is not inside the outer loop

enum_values.name: VertexArrayForListOfEdges
enum_values.summary: Check of indices of vertices for edge list failed

enum_values.name: NonPlanarOuterloop
enum_values.summary: Outer loop points are not in the same plane with each other

enum_values.name: NonPlanarInnerloop
enum_values.summary: Inner loop points are not in the same plane with each other or with outer loop

enum_values.name: SelfIntersectingOuterloop
enum_values.summary: Outer loop is self-intersecting

enum_values.name: SelfIntersectingInnerloop
enum_values.summary: Inner loop is self-intersecting

enum_values.name: LoopNormalsInvalid
enum_values.summary: Inner loop normal direction should be opposite to outer loop

enum_values.name: FaceEdgesInvalidOrientation
enum_values.summary: Two neighbor faces with common edge have wrong orientation

enum_values.name: FaceEdgesPartlyInvalidOrientation
enum_values.summary: Two neighbor faces with partly common edge have wrong orientation

enum_values.name: MultishellPolymesh
enum_values.summary: Polymesh consists topologically of multiple shells

enum_values.name: MultishellPolymeshByGeometry
enum_values.summary: Polymesh consists geometrically of multiple shells

enum_values.name: NumberOfFaces
enum_values.summary: Number of faces too small

enum_values.name: VertexArrayUniqueness
enum_values.summary: The vertex array contains vertices that are geometrically equivalent

enum_values.name: VertexDuplicatesOnPolygon
enum_values.summary: The same vertex index appears at least twice for a face

enum_values.name: VertexCollinearOnPolygon
enum_values.summary: The face has at least one vertex that is collinear with others on an edge

enum_values.name: NonManifoldEdges
enum_values.summary: The polymesh contains non-manifold edges

enum_values.name: UnusedVertices
enum_values.summary: The polymesh contains unused vertices
